Reviews Contact

About Apex Veterinarian

12+ years serving Asheville and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Apex Veterinarian has grown from a small practice to Asheville's most trusted animal care provider. Our roots run deep in Buncombe County, where we've cared for generations of local pets.

We believe in personalized medicine that considers each pet's lifestyle - whether they're hiking the Blue Ridge trails or lounging in a Montford historic home. Our team stays current on the latest treatments while maintaining old-fashioned compassion.

From sponsoring River Arts District pet events to volunteering at Buncombe County shelters, we're committed to Asheville's four-legged community members.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Apex Veterinarian

Trusted veterinary professionals serving Asheville, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-vet-r92
